title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Gaurs Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Gaurs Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Gaurs Group:
Gaurs Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gaurs Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
